name: end_rot200
prompt: Keep this entire image perfectly identical — the chrome hand, the open compact, the chrome reflected face, the closed berry lips, the hoop earrings, the hair, the dark galaxy background and the exact framing — all completely unchanged. The ONLY change: rotate the holographic rainbow light pattern on the round disc around its centre by about 200 degrees clockwise, so the coloured radial streaks now point in a clearly different direction, as if the disc has turned. Keep the disc's round elliptical shape, its position, size and centre hole exactly the same — only its rainbow streaks are rotated. Nothing else moves or changes.

name: end_rot120
